info.title: SupplyChainData REST Services
info.description: APIs for managing Plans and related entities

tags.name: Supply Chain Collaborative Space
tags.description: Supply Chain Collaborative Space web services

parameters.name: sccsid
parameters.description: ID of the Supply Chain Collaborative Space the entity belongs to

schema.description: ID of the Supply Chain Collaborative Space the entity belongs to

parameters.name: planType
parameters.description: Plan type to filter on

schema.description: Plan type to filter on

parameters.name: planningScopeId
parameters.description: Planning scope ID to filter on

schema.description: Planning scope ID to filter on

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Plan statuses to filter on, the plan will be included in the result if it has one of these statuses

schema.description: Plan statuses to filter on, the plan will be included in the result if it has one of these statuses

items.description: Plan statuses to filter on, the plan will be included in the result if it has one of these statuses

parameters.name: validationStatuses
parameters.description: Plan validation statuses to filter on, the plan will be included in the result if it has one of these statuses

schema.description: Plan validation statuses to filter on, the plan will be included in the result if it has one of these statuses

parameters.name: createdDateRangeStart
parameters.description: Used in combination with createdDateRangeEnd to define a range of dates to filter plans by created date. If createdDateRangeEnd is not set, the end is MAX_VALUE.

schema.description: Used in combination with createdDateRangeEnd to define a range of dates to filter plans by created date. If createdDateRangeEnd is not set, the end is MAX_VALUE.

parameters.name: createdDateRangeEnd
parameters.description: Used in combination with createdDateRangeStart to define a range of dates to filter plans by created date. If createdDateRangeStart is not set, the start is MIN_VALUE.

schema.description: Used in combination with createdDateRangeStart to define a range of dates to filter plans by created date. If createdDateRangeStart is not set, the start is MIN_VALUE.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The number of items to be skipped from the beginning of the result

schema.description: The number of items to be skipped from the beginning of the result

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to be returned per page

schema.description: The maximum number of items to be returned per page

200.description: OK. The request has succeeded. The information returned with the response is dependent on the method used in the request, for example: GET an entity corresponding to the requested resource is sent in the response; HEAD the entity-header fields corresponding to the requested resource are sent in the response without any message-body; POST an entity describing or containing the result of the action; TRACE an entity containing the request message as received by the end server.

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

404.description: NOT FOUND. The server has not found anything matching the Request-URI, or required entity record.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, then the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once, then the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response, since that entity might include relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in "HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication".

500.description: INTERNAL SERVER ERROR. A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

post.description: Creates a plan. Only 1 plan can be created per request.

415.description: UNSUPPORTED MEDIA TYPE. The server refuses to accept the request because the payload format is in an unsupported format.

name.description: Name of the file, unique within this request, may be different than the file's name in the file system

originId.description: Identifier from origin system. This is only for the origin system's reference and is stored, but not used, by SCDM

planningScopeId.description: Planning Scope ID, only required when creating a Snapshot-registered plan

snapshotId.description: Snapshot ID, only required when creating a Snapshot-registered plan

planPeriods.description: List of periods that the plan has metrics for

planInputs.description: List of plans used as inputs for this plan

files.description: List of metrics files for this plan

id.description: ID of plan used as input

versionId.description: Version of plan used as input

type.description: Type of relation between the plans

versionId.description: The version of the plan. Starts at 1.

originId.description: Identifier from origin system. This is only for the origin system's reference and is stored, but not used, by SCDM

createdDate.description: The timestamp when the entity was created

uploadUrl.description: URL that origin system uses to upload files

uploadTicket.description: Ticket that origin system uses to upload files

files.description: List of metrics files for this plan

fileId.description: ID used to download file from object storage

name.description: Name of the file when registered in plan registry

bucket.description: Bucket that the file is uploaded to

originId.description: Identifier from origin system. This is only for the origin system's reference and is stored, but not used, by SCDM

snapshotId.description: Snapshot ID, only required when creating a Snapshot-registered plan

planPeriods.description: List of periods that the plan has metrics for

planInputs.description: List of plans used as inputs for this plan

files.description: List of metrics files for this plan

status.description: The (functional) status to assign to the plan.

receipt.description: DFS checkin receipt. Only applicable if success = true

success.description: Indicates whether the upload procedure succeeded. This value can be omitted, which defaults to 'true'. In case of 'false', then the receipt field may be null.

id.description: The supply chain collaborative space's id

name.description: Name of the supply chain collaborative space

description.description: Description for the supply chain collaborative space
description.example: The common space for all members

fileId.description: ID used to download file from object storage

name.description: Name of the file when registered in plan registry

bucket.description: Bucket that the file is uploaded to

id.description: ID of plan used as input

versionId.description: Version of plan used as input

type.description: Type of relation between the plans

originId.description: Identifier from origin system. This is only for the origin system's reference and is stored, but not used, by SCDM

versionId.description: Version number of the plan, the first plan starts at version 1, as more versions are created, this number increases

planningScopeId.description: Planning Scope ID, only required when creating a Snapshot-registered plan

snapshotId.description: Snapshot ID, only required when creating a Snapshot-registered plan

createdDate.description: The timestamp when the entity was created

nrOfPeriods.description: Number of periods in this plan

validationStatus.description: Status to indicate whether all checks on the plan have been completed (and what the result was).

planInputs.description: List of plans used as inputs for this plan

files.description: List of metrics files for this plan

fileId.description: ID used to download file from object storage

name.description: Name of the file when registered in plan registry

url.description: A (long) URL that can be used to download the file from the DFS.

versionId.description: The version of the plan. Starts at 1.

originId.description: Identifier from origin system. This is only for the origin system's reference and is stored, but not used, by SCDM

validationStatus.description: Status to indicate whether all checks on the plan have been completed (and what the result was).

createdDate.description: The timestamp when the entity was created

files.description: List of metrics files for this plan
